Why Foaps

The smarter way to run your restaurant

From order chaos to complete control — Foaps gives you everything you need to manage your food delivery business in one place.

Start for Free Get a Demo

Everything your restaurant needs, in one platform

Foaps is built specifically for restaurants managing online orders across multiple delivery platforms.

  • 📊

    Unified Dashboard

    View and manage all your orders from Swiggy, Zomato, Dunzo and more in a single, clean interface. No more app-switching.

  • ⚡

    Real-time Sync

    Menu updates, pricing changes, and availability synced across all platforms the moment you make a change.

  • 📈

    Actionable Analytics

    In-depth reports help you identify top-selling items, peak hours, and areas to improve — so you can grow with data.

  • 🔗

    Easy Integrations

    Foaps integrates seamlessly with major food delivery platforms in India. Getting started takes minutes, not days.

  • 🛡️

    Reliable & Secure

    Your restaurant data is safe with us. We use industry-standard security practices to protect your business information.

  • 🤝

    Dedicated Support

    Our team is here to help you get the most out of Foaps. Reach out any time via email or chat.

Ready to take control of your restaurant?

Join hundreds of restaurants already using Foaps to manage orders smarter.
